    public final class ApiErrorAssert
extends org.assertj.core.api.AbstractListAssert<ApiErrorAssert,​List<org.forgerock.api.annotations.ApiError>,​org.forgerock.api.annotations.ApiError,​org.assertj.core.api.ObjectAssert<org.forgerock.api.annotations.ApiError>>
    This class represents the ApiError annotation.
    Since:
    14.0.0

      • hasI18nDescriptions

        public ApiErrorAssert hasI18nDescriptions()
        Assert that all descriptions use i18n and that the keys have valid entries in the specifies resource bundle.
        Returns:
        An instance of ApiErrorAssert.

      • schemas

        public ApiSchemaAssert schemas()
        Get the test representative of Schemas in the annotated error.
        Returns:
        The ApiSchemaAssert containing the Schemas.
